2.description: Dominance violations by complexity. This figure plots point estimates and 95% confidence intervals for the average frequency with which participants violate dominance, clustering standard errors by individual. Dominance violations are coded as one if, for the lottery at hand, the individual selects a switch row with sure outcome strictly less than the lowest possible outcome in a lottery, and zero otherwise.
